evidence: chat analysis 2026-07-19: 100 aligned 20-min points kitesailing-chart vs SIA, ratio 0.80 (n=60 windy)
approved_transformations.review_due: once >=14 independent overlapping days exist in the sampler logs

reviewer_note: Provisional SIA-first policy (v2): direct lake measurements (kitesailing/windsurfcenter/silvaplana_lake) always outrank SIA; SIA is the principal reference when no lake reading exists; a missing SIA hour stays UNLABELED - Samedan is deliberately excluded as a default label (allow_samedan_fallback=false) and may only be re-enabled inside an explicitly named research experiment (legacy_samedan_proxy), never silently. sia_confidence is null on purpose: SIA's measurement quality (official MeteoSwiss station) is a separate question from its equivalence to the Windsurfcenter/lake target, which is UNMEASURED - only 5 lake readings exist as of 2026-07-17, far below the 14-independent-day minimum reporting gate in station_calibration.py. Any future change to relationship_classification/approved_transformations requires a reviewed edit of this file citing a real station_calibration.py report - never an automatic write by any script. | v3 (2026-07-19): owner explicitly approved a PROVISIONAL SIA/lake ratio of 0.8 ("assume it's right and correct later if needed"), implemented solely as SIA_REFERENCE_KT 10.0->8.0 in ground_truth.py. This does NOT claim calibration maturity: sia_calibration_status stays insufficient_evidence and the 14-day gate still applies for any formal relationship classification. Re-derive the ratio from station_calibration.py once the kitesailing sampler has ~2 weeks of overlap, then either confirm or correct this constant and bump the policy version again.
